for uid in "50bb57f0-7dcf-481e-8d9c-c37bcda2e980" "43b8c2e4-35eb-42cb-bbc4-5a13ad06ee83" "e38fcb30-0a58-46fc-b127-fb355a75033e" "4377d4f1-8dfa-489e-965d-08c7d27fba90" "e13ab8ab-97d8-4374-a4e9-eb7fa8c8fb36" "ee08e7ad-29e0-45a4-8467-22f0e152c658"; do
  echo "Deleting $uid..."
  curl -s -X DELETE "$SB_URL/auth/v1/admin/users/$uid" \\
    -H "Authorization: Bearer $SB_KEY" \\
    -H "apikey: $SB_ANON"
  echo ""
done)
